title: Vellode Birds Sanctuary
tagline: Vellode Birds Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vellode Birds Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary located in Erode District, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Vellode Birds Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary located in Erode District, Tamil Nadu, India. The sanctuary covers an area of .77 km2 (0.30 mi2). The sanctuary is located near Vellode, about 12 km from Erode. It has been designated as a protected Ramsar site since 2022.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pungampadi
topPlaces.description: Pungampadi is a neighbourhood in Erode district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. Pungampadi is located at an altitude of about 263 m above the mean sea level with the geographical coordinates of 11.269200°N 77.652200°E / 11.269200; 77.652200.

topPlaces.description: Kathirampatti is a Village Panchayat in Erode district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This Village Panchayat include villages namely Kathirampatti, Nanjanapuram, Pavalathampalayam & Chinna Medu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vellode Birds Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vellode Birds Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vellode Birds Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (71 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (80 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vellode Birds Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vellode Birds Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vellode Birds Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Vellode Birds Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vellode Birds Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pungampadi, Kavundachipalayam, Veppampalayam, Kathirampatti, Pavalathampalayam.
